title: Bug fixes (4) + insider trading signal engine integration

bugs_found: earnings_intelligence.py: datetime.now() vs timezone-aware yfinance dates causes TypeError when computing days_until_earnings
portfolio_optimizer.py: _fetch_returns uses .dropna() which drops ALL rows when any ticker has different start date, losing significant history
cross_sectional_momentum.py: percentile calculation never reaches 100 for top stock (formula: (1-rank/n)*100 gives 99.0 for best)
cross_sectional_momentum.py: quintile calculation produces uneven distribution (Q5 gets more members than Q1 due to floor behavior)
signal_engine.py: insider trading signal is fetched in stock router but never passed to get_stock_signal() as a composite component
observation.gap_identified: Insider trading signal was display-only data — not integrated into the composite buy/sell signal engine like options and earnings signals are

bugs_fixed: Fixed timezone-aware datetime comparison in earnings_intelligence.py using getattr(date, 'tzinfo', None)
Fixed portfolio_optimizer.py _fetch_returns to use ffill(limit=5).dropna(how='all').dropna() instead of plain .dropna() that lost data
Fixed cross_sectional_momentum.py percentile: (n-rank)/(n-1)*100 gives top=100, bottom=0
Fixed cross_sectional_momentum.py quintile: 5-int(i*5/n) gives even distribution across 1-5
implementation.feature_built: Integrated insider trading signal as 11th component in stock signal engine (weight=0.10). Cluster buying triggers 'Insider cluster buying detected' reason. Wired through screener, individual stock analysis, and /stock/{ticker}/signal endpoint.

limitations: Insider signal in screener adds an additional API call per stock (yfinance insider_transactions), which may slightly increase screener latency
Insider data quality varies — yfinance fallback may miss some transactions vs Finnhub API
Portfolio optimizer ffill(limit=5) may introduce small forward-looking bias in edge cases
assessment.self_critique: Could have also integrated insider signal into the market-level signal (aggregate insider buying across the universe as a breadth indicator). The portfolio_optimizer fix could use a more sophisticated approach like cross-sectional fill or interpolation instead of simple ffill.

next_steps: Integrate liquidity risk into portfolio position sizing (liquidity-adjusted weights)
Add insider trading aggregate breadth signal to market-level signal engine
Wire Google Trends fear/greed into macro risk dashboard endpoint
Add conformal prediction intervals for crash probabilities
Improve screener performance with parallel insider data fetching
